nasb.text: Now when they had finished circumcising all the nation, they remained in their places in the camp until they were healed.

esv.text: When the circumcising of the whole nation was finished, they remained in their places in the camp until they were healed.

cnv.text: 全國的人受了割禮之後，都住在營中自己的地方，直到痊愈。

ccb.text: 全体民众受了割礼后，都留在自己的营内，直到康复为止。
